title: Multi-format document rendering in web UI (reveal.js / HTML first)
description:
Enable non-Markdown issue-linked documents to be viewed through the web UI via a pluggable renderer registry. First concrete child story under Docs Lifecycle Phase 2 (94f873c8), addressing the epic's "Limited format support (Markdown only)" problem statement.

Target artifact type: reveal.js HTML presentations (e.g. ../gf2 docs/presentations/*.html). Rendering mode: inline sandboxed iframe plus "Open in new tab" escape hatch. Framework is generic — PDF / AsciiDoc / Jupyter are follow-ons that just register another renderer.

Design doc: dev/active/abfd6016-multi-format-doc-rendering-design.md

## Child task breakdown

- (a) 75b1ccb8 Server: expand content-type inference + add raw-bytes endpoint
- (b) 42bd50ce Web: extract renderer-registry abstraction from DocumentViewer
- (c) eeafaa78 Web: HtmlRenderer component (sandboxed iframe + open-in-new-tab) — depends on (a) and (b)
- (d) 85bd1288 Core: register HtmlAdapter in Rust format registry

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Server returns Content-Type: text/html for .html documents (curl /api/issues/:id/documents/:path/content on a .html fixture shows text/html in the JSON; new /raw endpoint responds with text/html in the HTTP header).
- [ ] Server /api/issues/:id/documents/:path/raw endpoint returns the file bytes verbatim with correct Content-Type and a Content-Security-Policy response header permitting https:.
- [ ] Web renderer registry exists at web/src/components/Document/renderers/index.ts with at least two entries (html-match, markdown-catchall) and a pickRenderer(content, ref) helper; unit tests verify dispatch for text/html, text/markdown, and unknown content types.
- [ ] DocumentViewer.tsx no longer imports react-markdown directly; rendering is delegated to pickRenderer. Visual regression: existing markdown documents render identically (same HTML output, same search highlighting, same history panel behavior).
- [ ] HtmlRenderer renders a sandboxed iframe (sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups") pointing at the server raw endpoint; a reveal.js deck from ../gf2 loads and slides navigate via arrow keys when opened through the web UI.
- [ ] HtmlRenderer header includes an "Open in new tab" link whose href is the raw endpoint URL with target="_blank" rel="noopener".
- [ ] Rust HtmlAdapter is registered in AdapterRegistry::with_builtins(); AdapterRegistry::with_builtins().resolve("foo.html", "") returns an adapter with id() == "html".
- [ ] jit document add <issue> <file.html> persists format: "html" in the DocumentReference JSON (verify by inspecting .jit/issues/<id>.json after).
- [ ] All four child tasks have cargo-ci + code-review gates passing.
- [ ] Full workspace: cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings, cargo test --workspace all clean.
- [ ] Web workspace: cd web && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build all clean.
